ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "subdivision" TEXT /* Subdivision or neighborhood of the property */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the property (e.g., Ranch, Colonial) */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" REAL /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "list_price" TEXT /* Listing price of the property */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Sale price of the property */,
  "days_on_market" INTEGER /* Number of days the property was on the market */,
  "closed_date" TEXT /* Date the property was closed */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "lot_size" TEXT /* Lot size of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the property record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the agent belongs to */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the agent was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the agent was terminated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the office */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the office */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the office belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_agents" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the agent's assignment to the property */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the agent's assignment to the property */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the agent (e.g., listing agent, selling agent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "ownership_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of ownership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_owners_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price of the sale */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission earned on the sale */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative (e.g., agent or attorney) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative (e.g., agent or attorney) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "preferred_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, email, viewing) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_interactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_interactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_interactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., pool, garden) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "photo_description" TEXT /* Description of the photo */,
  "photo_date" TEXT /* Date the photo was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_photos_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "open_houses" (
  "open_house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each open house */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "open_house_date" TEXT /* Date of the open house */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the open house */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the open house */,
  "host_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hosting agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("open_house_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_open_houses_host_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_open_houses_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_documents_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date of the history event */,
  "history_event" TEXT /* Description of the history event */,
  "history_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the history event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_analysis" TEXT /* Detailed analysis of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" TEXT /* Value of the forecast */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast (e.g., 0-100%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, agent, client) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
